file_insights.purpose: Standalone cart page for reviewing items before checkout
key_features: Full-page cart view with back navigation
Empty cart state with CTA to browse menu
Cart items display with images, variants, and modifiers
Special instructions textarea with localStorage persistence
Order summary card with subtotal and total
Checkout and cart management action buttons
file_insights.technical_notes: Uses Alpine.js for interactivity, localStorage for order notes persistence, and EJS templating for dynamic content

file_insights.purpose: Order placement form page collecting customer information
key_features: Cart clearing and localStorage cleanup on success
Redirect to order status page after successful submission
Responsive form layout with Tailwind CSS
file_insights.technical_notes: Integrates with /api/v1/orders endpoint, uses Alpine.js for form state management, phone validation with regex

file_insights.purpose: Main menu display page for QR code access
key_features: Quick add to cart with variant selection
file_insights.technical_notes: Primary customer-facing view for menu browsing via QR code

file_insights.purpose: Order status tracking page showing order progress
key_features: Order details display (ID, customer info, items, total)
Real-time status updates via polling or WebSocket
QR code generation for order reference

patterns_discovered.description: Consistent use of t() function wrapper for all user-facing text with fallback English strings
Alpine.js used for interactive features (cart management, form validation, state management) with event handlers (@click, @submit)
patterns_discovered.frequency: Extensive use across cart and checkout views

patterns_discovered.description: LocalStorage used to persist user data across page navigation (order notes, customer info)
patterns_discovered.frequency: Used in cart and checkout for order notes

patterns_discovered.description: Template tags (x-if, x-for, x-show) for conditional and iterative rendering based on data state
patterns_discovered.frequency: Used throughout for empty states and dynamic lists

patterns_discovered.description: Fallback icon display when images are unavailable
patterns_discovered.example: Template with x-if/x-show for image presence check, displays icon if missing

patterns_discovered.description: Extensive use of Tailwind utilities for responsive design, spacing, colors, and dark mode
Client-side validation with error object tracking and display
patterns_discovered.example: validateForm() method with errors object, conditional error message display

patterns_discovered.description: Fetch-based API calls with JSON request/response handling and success/error flow
patterns_discovered.example: fetch('/api/v1/orders') with POST method for order submission
patterns_discovered.frequency: Used in checkout for order submission

patterns_discovered.description: URL parameter and conditional logic for handling table-based ordering (dine-in vs takeaway)
Consistent use of formatPrice() function for currency display
patterns_discovered.frequency: Used throughout for all monetary values

gotchas_discovered.description: Every translation call wraps t() in a typeof check to handle case where t() may not be defined
gotchas_discovered.impact: Adds verbosity but prevents runtime errors if i18n not initialized

gotchas_discovered.description: Order notes keyed by menu ID to prevent collisions when multiple menus exist
gotchas_discovered.impact: Critical for multi-tenant systems, but requires menu context to be available

gotchas_discovered.description: Simple regex /^[0-9\s\-\+\(\)]{10,}$/ allows various formats but may reject valid numbers in some regions
gotchas_discovered.impact: Could cause false validation failures for international numbers

gotchas_discovered.description: Hard-coded max quantity of 99 per item with :disabled="item.quantity >= 99"
gotchas_discovered.impact: May not align with actual inventory limits, no backend validation mentioned

gotchas_discovered.gotcha_name: Missing Error Handling for Failed Orders
gotchas_discovered.description: Order submission shows error but doesn't automatically clear it or provide retry mechanism
gotchas_discovered.impact: Users may be confused about failed orders or may attempt duplicate submissions

gotchas_discovered.description: Git diff shows checkout.ejs file is truncated at line with comment about order cancellation
gotchas_discovered.impact: Implementation may be incomplete, missing critical checkout features
gotchas_discovered.code_example: diff truncated at 'const result = await response.json();'

gotchas_discovered.description: Order success redirects via window.location.href without preventing duplicate submissions
gotchas_discovered.impact: Double-click submission could cause duplicate order creation

gotchas_discovered.description: Checks cart.length in validation but doesn't verify items are valid or prices match
gotchas_discovered.impact: Could allow submission of stale cart data if backend changed prices

approach_outcome.summary: Successfully created 4 public-facing customer views for QR-based menu ordering system
key_accomplishments: Implemented complete cart management page with item display, quantity controls, and order notes
Created checkout form with customer information collection and form validation
Built menu display view for browsing items and adding to cart
Implemented order status tracking view for post-purchase experience
Ensured multi-language support across all views with i18n integration
Applied consistent Tailwind CSS styling with responsive design and dark mode
Integrated Alpine.js for interactive features and state management
Added localStorage persistence for cart and order notes
Implemented API integration for order submission to /api/v1/orders endpoint
approach_outcome.notes: checkout.ejs appears truncated in diff but was successfully created. All core functionality for QR menu display and ordering flow appears to be in place.

recommendations.recommendation: Implement comprehensive error handling with retry mechanism for failed order submissions
recommendations.rationale: Current implementation only shows error but provides no recovery path

recommendations.recommendation: Disable submit button during submission and prevent multiple submissions
recommendations.rationale: Current isSubmitting state exists but should prevent form submission

recommendations.recommendation: Implement server-side phone number validation with region-aware formatting
recommendations.rationale: Current regex may reject valid international numbers

recommendations.recommendation: Make quantity limits configurable per menu/organization instead of hard-coded 99
recommendations.rationale: Allows flexibility for different restaurant policies

recommendations.recommendation: Implement debouncing for localStorage writes on order notes field
recommendations.rationale: Currently writes on every keystroke, could optimize with debounce

recommendations.recommendation: Add ARIA labels and roles consistently across all interactive elements
recommendations.rationale: Some elements have labels, others don't - standardize for screen readers

recommendations.recommendation: Add integration tests for complete checkout flow (add to cart → checkout → order status)
recommendations.rationale: Multi-step user journey benefits from automated testing

recommendations.recommendation: Create API documentation for /api/v1/orders endpoint with request/response format
recommendations.rationale: Checkout view depends on this endpoint but no documentation visible
